description_long: This object appears to be a heavily weathered and partially buried airplane wreck, with much of its fuselage embedded in a rough, earth-toned terrain. The visible section includes a rectangular pit exposing the remains of the cockpit area and some cylindrical components, possibly representing engine or landing gear remnants. The surface is predominantly dusty and uneven, with broken and jagged edges suggesting significant damage or decay. Two upright, column-like structures protrude from the central cavity, likely representing damaged structural elements or landing gear struts. The surrounding ground is irregular, with a shallow depression encompassing the exposed airplane parts. The overall appearance is that of an abandoned or excavated aircraft relic, blending into a muted, stony environment.
description: A partially buried, damaged airplane wreck with exposed cockpit and structural remains, set in a rough, earth-toned terrain.
description_view_0: Side view showing the low profile of the wreck and the protruding upright structures from the central cavity.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the rectangular pit and the exposed cylindrical and upright elements within the wreck.
description_view_2: Top-down view revealing the full extent of the pit, the cockpit area, and the surrounding uneven terrain.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the upright columns and the broken, jagged edges of the exposed fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with straight, broken wings; no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles due to damage.
attribute_engine_type: No intact engines visible; only cylindrical remnants possibly representing engine mounts.
attribute_tail_design: No discernible tail structure present; tail section appears to be missing or buried.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Remnants of fixed landing gear visible as upright columns within the exposed pit.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open cockpit area exposed within the central pit; no canopy or windows visible.
